sources.name: FATF 40 Recommendations (2012, updated 2023)
sources.completeness_note: All 40 FATF Recommendations with full text

sources.name: United Nations Convention against Corruption
sources.completeness_note: Key provisions covering preventive measures, criminalization, international cooperation, and asset recovery

sources.name: OECD Anti-Bribery Convention
sources.completeness_note: All 13 articles of the Convention on Combating Bribery

sources.name: Fourth Anti-Money Laundering Directive (4AMLD)
sources.completeness_note: Key provisions on CDD, beneficial ownership, suspicious transaction reporting

sources.name: Fifth Anti-Money Laundering Directive (5AMLD)
sources.completeness_note: Key amendments: beneficial ownership registers, virtual currencies, high-value goods

sources.name: Sixth Anti-Money Laundering Directive (6AMLD)
sources.completeness_note: Key provisions on ML predicate offences, aiding/abetting, corporate liability

sources.name: EU AML Regulation 2024 (AMLR)
sources.completeness_note: Key provisions from directly applicable AML regulation replacing directive-based approach

sources.name: GRECO Evaluation Reports
sources.completeness_note: Evaluation round themes and key recommendations across 5 rounds

sources.name: Wolfsberg Group Standards
sources.completeness_note: Key standards on correspondent banking, private banking, sanctions, trade finance, and payments

sources.name: FATF Country Ratings (Grey/Black Lists)
sources.completeness_note: All current grey and black list entries with deficiencies and action plans

sources.name: FATF Mutual Evaluations
sources.completeness_note: Selected country evaluations with effectiveness and technical compliance ratings

gaps.description: UNCAC includes key provisions only, not all 71 articles
gaps.reason: Full treaty text is lengthy; key provisions selected for compliance relevance

gaps.description: EU AML Directives include key articles only, not complete directive text
gaps.reason: Complete directive text is covered by comprehensive-eu-law-mcp
FATF has evaluated 200+ jurisdictions; expanding in future versions

gaps.description: Wolfsberg standards include key requirements, not full standard text
gaps.reason: Full standards are lengthy; key requirements extracted

gaps.description: GRECO data covers evaluation round themes, not per-country reports
gaps.reason: Per-country GRECO reports are numerous and frequently updated

tools.name: search_aml_requirements
tools.description: FTS5 search across all AML/anti-corruption provisions

tools.name: get_fatf_recommendation
tools.description: Retrieve a specific FATF Recommendation by number (1-40)

tools.name: get_fatf_country_rating
tools.description: Get FATF grey/black list status for a country

tools.name: get_fatf_mutual_evaluation
tools.description: Get FATF mutual evaluation results for a country

tools.name: get_directive_article
tools.description: Retrieve articles from EU AML Directives or other source documents

tools.name: get_wolfsberg_standard
tools.description: Retrieve Wolfsberg Group standards by title or category

tools.name: assess_aml_risk
tools.description: Assess AML risk factors for a jurisdiction with optional sector filter

tools.name: map_aml_obligations
tools.description: Map applicable AML/anti-corruption frameworks for a jurisdiction and entity type

tools.name: compare_aml_regimes
tools.description: Compare AML frameworks and FATF ratings between multiple jurisdictions

tools.name: list_sources
tools.description: List all data sources with provision counts and metadata

tools.name: about
tools.description: Server metadata, data coverage, and disclaimer

tools.name: check_data_freshness
tools.description: Check database build date, schema version, and source breakdown
